signals.evidence: Last inbound buyer email (Benita, NDA/registration) 8 Apr; Eid 25 May, resources 8/19 May, reconnect 3 Jul all REP-SENT into silence — no buyer reply on any channel since
Owner Dan Quinn -> Mohamad Alhakim (by Carl Kimball); 3 Jul email 'Dan Quinn has recently moved on... I am Mohamad Alhakim... I will be your' — unanswered
'draft RFP is nearly completed - expecting the launch sometime in next few weeks... focus only on Sourcing now' — 54+ days overdue, no RFP landed
Amount 230000->150000 (1 Apr); PQQ 16 Mar 'Appears to be for sourcing only, previously iSupplier, iRisk & CLM were included'
'they are emphasising local support requirements... if local support is a showstopper we will qualify out'; UAE-based support resource mandatory
PQQ submitted 26 Mar, clarifications addressed through 8 Apr — genuine (rep-side) procurement participation; buyer invited us to the PQQ 16 Mar
CloseDate 2026-07-31 -> 2026-09-30; 7th push since Jan 2025 per field/prior record
Champion Mohamed Arshed self-drove both POCs but silent since 14 May; EB Ahmed Raafat only cc'd since the 17 Apr 2025 demo
Coupa faded (1 mention 28 Nov 2024), JAGGAER incumbency unconfirmed/contradicted, GEP no call corroboration; strongest threat is status-quo/do-nothing
Two POC sessions (29 May, 12 Jun 2025), fit ~70-80%, 'very unusual process', functionality/version-control gaps (>90d, context only)

top_rationale: A genuinely live ~20-month sourcing evaluation has STALLED behind an unlaunched RFP: the buyer has been dark ~90 days since the 8 Apr PQQ/NDA thread, with every May–Jul outreach unanswered.
The deal narrowed to sourcing-only and the amount was cut $230k->$150k (1 Apr); iSupplier/iRisk/CLM were dropped from the PQQ — shrinking both value and footprint.
The 14 May 'draft RFP nearly complete, launching in a few weeks' plan is now 54+ days overdue with nothing landed — the single biggest blocker to any 2026 close.
Zycus reassigned the account (Dan Quinn -> Mohamad Alhakim, 29 Jun); the new owner's 3 Jul reconnect email is unanswered, so the relationship is mid-reset with no buyer acknowledgment.
No competitor is ahead (Coupa faded, JAGGAER incumbency unconfirmed) — the real threat is inertia/status-quo, not a competitive loss; owner's self-stated confidence is 20%.
UAE-local support is a buyer-mandated potential SHOWSTOPPER the rep has flagged as a qualify-out trigger.

drivers: ⚠️ Buyer dark ~90 days — no substantive two-way engagement since the 8 Apr PQQ/NDA thread; Eid (25 May), resources (8/19 May) and the 3 Jul reconnect all sent into silence. ► New owner Mohamad Alhakim must secure a live call with Ahmad Jan / Mohamed Arshed this week to confirm the project is still live — or qualify out.

⚠️ RFP never launched — the 14 May 'nearly complete, launching in a few weeks' plan is 54+ days overdue with nothing landed. ► Press for a firm, dated RFP launch commitment; without it, the 30 Sep close is not credible.
⚠️ Scope & amount cut — narrowed to sourcing-only, amount $230k->$150k, iSupplier/iRisk/CLM dropped. ► Re-qualify at the reduced scope and confirm budget authority for $150k with EB Ahmed Raafat.

⚠️ Champion cooling / EB passive — Mohamed Arshed silent since 14 May; Ahmed Raafat only cc'd since the Apr 2025 demo. ► Multi-thread and re-engage the EB directly to reconfirm sponsorship for the narrowed scope.
✅ No competitor ahead — Coupa faded, JAGGAER incumbency unconfirmed, GEP uncorroborated; the deal is losable to inertia, not to a rival — a real (if fragile) re-open window remains.
⚠️ UAE-local support mandated — rep flagged it as a qualify-out trigger. ► Confirm Zycus can meet the UAE-local support requirement before any further investment.
win.focus_now: Get a live re-engagement call this week to confirm the RFP is still live and the deal still qualifies at the reduced sourcing-only scope; if the buyer stays dark, qualify out rather than forecast it.
win.ceiling_applied: Formal Evaluation / RFP-round stage ceiling ≤60 available but NOT binding — score sits far below it; operative adjustment is the evidence-based downward correction below the Formal-Eval anchor (35).
win.exception_statement: Field OVER-positions the deal: recorded Formal Evaluation (anchor 35) but hard evidence — ~90d dark, RFP 54+ days overdue and never launched, amount cut $230k->$150k, scope shrunk, champion cooling — shows a genuine stall, so scored BELOW the Formal-Eval anchor. ► Move the stage back toward Qualified/Initial Interest (or re-qualify) and correct the non-credible 30 Sep 2026 close date in Salesforce.

drivers: ⚠️ Buyer dark — zero buyer-initiated action in the 14/30/60-day windows; last real two-way engagement was the 8 Apr PQQ/NDA thread (>60d, zero recency weight). ► Convert the new-owner intro into a live, dated session to restart two-way motion.
⚠️ One-way rep chasing — Eid, resources and the 3 Jul reconnect all sent into silence (who-weight x0.1). ► Stop broadcasting content; get one scheduled meeting on the calendar via Benita/Ahmad.

⚠️ No live future milestone — the 14 May RFP-launch plan is undated and overdue; no future meeting or open task exists, so process-mode is OFF (anti-zombie guard fired). ► Secure a dated RFP launch date from Ahmad Jan.

⚠️ Owner handoff mid-stall — Dan Quinn -> Mohamad Alhakim (29 Jun) resets the relationship with no buyer acknowledgment yet. ► Warm-introduce the new owner through the existing operational contacts rather than cold outreach.
✅ Close-date push within tolerance — 31 Jul -> 30 Sep (61 days) reads as neutral timing this cycle, not fresh slippage.
⚠️ Customer passivity — rep drives all cadence; the buyer has not initiated since April. ► Create a buyer-owned next step (RFP date / clarification deadline) so motion isn't rep-dependent.
mom.focus_now: Turn the new-owner reconnect into a live, dated call this week — a scheduled RFP launch date is the single thing that would lift this off the floor; until then it is stalling, not moving.

prospect_requirements.item: Confirm Zycus can meet the mandatory UAE-local support requirement (buyer's stated evaluation criterion / potential showstopper)

Address the buyer's technical-document version-control / audit-trail asks (multi-round PTCs, view v1+v2+v3, split-award by value, regret emails, Oracle PR integration) surfaced in the POC — bundle into the RFP response

zycus_commitments.item: New owner Mohamad Alhakim to complete the reconnect / formal handoff and re-establish a point of contact with the buying team
zycus_commitments.grounding_quote: I wanted to let you know that Dan Quinn has recently moved on from Zycus. I am Mohamad Alhakim, Regional Sales Director-ME at Zycus, and I will be your [contact]

zycus_commitments.item: Deliver the promised end-to-end sourcing process video (incl. version-control workaround) committed at the POC — verify it is still relevant after the sourcing-only scope change before re-sending
zycus_commitments.grounding_quote: we're gonna share the recorded video as well... share us the complete end to end process video

waiting_on_buyer.item: Launch of the draft RFP the buyer said was 'nearly complete' on 14 May (undated, now 54+ days overdue)
Confirmation the project is still live and not shelved (buyer silent since ~mid-May; response to the 3 Jul reconnect email)

best_practices.item: Re-engage and confirm the deal is alive — new owner lands one live call with the buying team this week
best_practices.rank_reason: Deal is ~90d dark and dying to inertia; confirming it is live is the gate to every other action — highest blocking-power, most time-critical.

best_practices.item: Nail a firm, dated RFP launch date and formally qualify in/out at the sourcing-only scope
best_practices.rank_reason: Unblocks the next stage-gate; without a dated RFP there is no credible path to close and the forecast is undefensible.

best_practices.item: Multi-thread to EB Ahmed Raafat and reconfirm sponsorship + $150k budget for the narrowed scope
best_practices.rank_reason: Single-threaded through a cooling champion (Mohamed Arshed); EB passive since Apr 2025 — removes the biggest single-point-of-failure risk.

best_practices.item: Resolve the UAE-local support feasibility question before further investment
best_practices.rank_reason: Buyer-mandated showstopper; settling it converts wasted effort into a clean qualify-in or a fast qualify-out.

sum.headline: No change in the last 24h — the buyer remains dark and the new owner's 3 Jul reconnect email is still unanswered.
sum.as_of_note: As of last week (outside the 24/48h window): the account was reassigned to new owner Mohamad Alhakim (29 Jun) and a reconnect email was sent (3 Jul) — both still unanswered; the ~90-day silence since the 8 Apr PQQ/NDA thread is unbroken.
